---
title: "Analyse_Comportement_Lynx"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
#importation tidyverse

library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(forcats)
library(lubridate)

library(emmeans)
library(glmmTMB)
library(bbmle)

library(blme)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(MuMIn)

library(performance)
library(ggeffects)

library(ggsignif)

```

```{r}
Tidy_Comportement <- read_csv("Data/Tidy_Comportement.csv")
View(Tidy_Comportement)
```


# GLM : Modèle ombrelle

```{r}

glm(
  Frottement ~
    
)

```
